text:
Hi Sir @Sam Karazi done uploading of resume for Finance & Accounting Controller 
and Accounting managers, thank you sir

Accounting managers
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/14DvqCEx3ja2DSa7GxJZdPIRpSCCBv--o?usp=drive_link

Finance & Accounting Controller
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1uDZrkCrxF25kKOLrH7KM5YcOp-anxszC?usp=drive_link

Team I need Someone to download all resumes from the Finance & Accounting Controller 
and Accounting managers
Let me know when and where the interviews will take place so can schedule 🙏🏼🙏🏼🙏🏼
Im not sold with the candidates. If I had to choose one it would be Mejia from Ajinomoto
@Ronald Caringal list their names with your comments, start date (availability) and asking salary
Are we telling them final interview? We might need more than 1 interview
Not really. I informed them that the next step would be an interview with the CEO and EVP of Business Ops

Here are the top candidates for final interview Sir @Chad Dominic Hernandez 

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1skbryYPnicf3xUY2PtL3cRG3SzFCf-o0?usp=drive_link
Let me review the applicants now
When do you plan to interview?
@Ronald Caringal please send the candidates you interviewed in here with your feedback
@Chad Dominic Hernandez @Andrew Rodel S. Manansala I need your help interviewing and selecting
Okay. I will try to call the other candidates tonight.

For EA

Done interviewing the following:
1. Jacqueline Valencerina (Top 1 in your list)
2. Myleene Apatan (Top 3 in your list)

Honest feedback: Based on the shortlisted profile, I think Jacqueline is really our best bet. Comparing to Ana and Grace (the previous candidate), she's a more refined EA and has a lot of exposure with tech. If you will allow, I want to invite her to a face to face interview with you tomorrow.

For Head of Finance and Accounting:

I already reached out to the Top 6 cand
Any updates on EA application and Accounting Controller Application?
Initial interview questions are in the document. All candidates were scored based on our job post and the issues we faced with Butch.
@Ronald Caringal please start immediately

Here @Sam Karazi 

https://ph.jobstreet.com/job/91094834?ref=cm-ui
@Ronald Caringal please share the job post for the Finance and Accounting Controller
When was that posted? Do we have candidates already?
Earlier. Yes, we have. I already shared some profiles in the other GC (CFO replacement)
Head of Finance and Accounting (Controller)
Did we post a senior accounting Head of Head of Finance or control job on Jobstreet @Ronald Caringal ?

@Sam Karazi Additional candidates were added to this folder.

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1rKT62of1omYJgxwVfa2v3UUpOyk_KD6J?usp=drive_link

Good afternoon @Sam KaraziThese are the only candidates that we have for now (from Formidea). I already reached out to other headhunters for assistance. Our team will also be sourcing already since there's no need to make Sir Butch's resignation confidential.

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1uDZrkCrxF25kKOLrH7KM5YcOp-anxszC?usp=drive_link

@Ronald Caringal Any update on the candidates? We cannot afford waiting until last minute to replace Butch 
Especially that Alyssa is also leaving with him

@Yvone Abdon @Ronald Caringal there were 34 employees enrolled with wrong Bio IDs in their stores bio devices 
Those wrong enrollments will affect the Payroll digital attendance records in comparison to the Manual/RAW DTR

We are actively sourcing through our 3rd party partner Sir @Chad Dominic Hernandez 

We are expecting to receive candidates until next week.
Do we have a replacement in mind already?

Just to be fair on Option 1, the guy is operating as usually (or even better, like full throttle) so from productivity perspective there is no decline or loss of trust. 

But from personality perspective he is definitely not behaving like a CFO, check last screenshot (nothing changed though, he never did behave like a CFO) 

My assessment of the situation and how I need to make my decision is, BD are now asking accounting for the P&L for Jan and Feb. And we will be closing the first quarter on A
@Ronald Caringal let me know if this is the correct format
I want Dom opinion on that. It is a good time to meet with his team separately now and interview them for a readiness check.
@Ronald Caringal Butch read the room and resigned by himself

We need to hire for her replacement sir. 

Thank you

I received 5 anonymous complaints all from SM Clark, all targeting the OIC. I'm sharing the exact words (Tagalog) with English translations below.

---

**Complaint 1 (11:44 AM)**
> "SHOUT OUT SA OIC NG SM CLARK NA INUNA PA PAGPUNTA SA SUBIC KAHAPON KESA MAGDUTY"

Translation: "Shoutout to the SM Clark OIC who prioritized going to Subic yesterday instead of reporting for duty."

**Complaint 2 (12:32 PM)**
> "LAGI NAMIN CHINICHECK NG MGA KASAMAHAN KO SA WORK IF NAHUHULUGAN CONTRIBUTION NAMIN, LAG

Gretz please meet the team: Butch is our CFO, Edlice is our regional manager and handles the day to day running of the stores. Dave is our Analyst but I am delegating a bigger role to him in our ongoing projects.
You can coordinate with Nad to schedule the interviews as well

Lifted from the email:

[VCC] Below are the list of talents whom we would like to meet individually.  If they are no longer connected with the company, we can delist them -
 
Eddlice
Alyssa
Mae Salumbides
Dom Hernandez
Drew Manansala
Pao Sunga
Herdie
Butch
Ronald Caringal and the entire HR Team
plus the replacement for Aldrin for the audit.
Hi @Ana Soriano! I just reviewed the email exchange between  @Sam Karazi and @Vivian Cruz . Perhaps you and I can start working on the scheduling the list of interviewees for the Audit?

Also, I noted in our recruitment group chat that the current direction is to review CVs only once a pool of 10 candidates has been completed.

I would like to flag that, from a recruitment and market standpoint, waiting to reach a full set of 10 candidates before screening may significantly affect our ability to secure strong applicants. As practiced, pre-selection is done in several smaller batches (typically in sets of three), after which we further shortlist and proceed with selection. This a

Hi, Sam! We had our first meeting with Nad and Butch yesterday morning. We have established a direct communication line between Nad/ Butch and Jeanette (Formidea's recruitment specialist). JD's have been provided for the first three urgent vacancies discussed with us:

1. Internal Audit Manager
2. Marketing Manager
3. Commissary Crew (6)

As of yesterday, right after the meeting, Jeanette has reached out to a few candidates.

It was agreed that assessments and rankings (preference of recommendat

@Ronald Caringal @Islar Catherine Isles @Angela Godino
Thank you @Alessandro Rey Formoso@Ronald Caringal @Ana Soriano @Islar Catherine Isles @Angela Godino @Chimes Marco
@Ronald Caringal

😂 I'm aware you are Christine, sorry I was sending the email and then typed this message and the name Vivian got stuck in my head. 
Let me discuss it with Butch our CFO tomorrow and get back to you.

Hi @Sam Karazi  I just saw the other chat you created. This is already in line with the pre-audit and audit exchanges, I presume? Will we maintain this private line for my personal engagement with Bebang? Will you need me tomorrow during the Excom? Will you allow me to just observe or sit in just to get a feel of things? Or will you prefer that I limit my interaction until we start the audit so that things won't be pre-empted?
